arts.ttl: Gary Neville explains why Man City's three-goal Feyenoord collapse was WORSE than embarrassing Tottenham defeat for Pep Guardiola's men
arts.sum: Gary Neville believes Man City's 3-3 draw with Feyenoord in midweek will have had a more damaging impact on the team than last weekend's 4-0 loss to Tottenham.

arts.ttl: How forgotten Liverpool star could help secure ELITE Salah replacement
arts.sum: The Georgian international has proven to be a revelation since joining the Italian side in 2022, leading Napoli to the Serie A title in his debut year and establishing himself as one of the standout wingers in world football. But Chiesa has barely featured since his €12m transfer from Juventus, with injuries and fitness struggles limiting the 27-year-old to just 18 minutes of Premier League football so far this season.

arts.ttl: One of Liverpool’s most in-form players could be in danger as Reds eye surprise transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly eyeing up a surprise transfer move for Paris Saint-Germain goalkeeper Gianluigi Donnarumma, despite already having plenty of quality in that position. Donnarumma has undoubtedly had a fine career at the top level in Europe, though his form has arguably dipped a little since he moved from AC Milan to PSG. arts.ttl: 'Tells you everything' - Liverpool sent new Mohamed Salah contract verdict as fresh plea made

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed boost in their pursuit of 24-year-old Tottenham and Newcastle target
arts.sum: Liverpool are keen on signing Antoine Semenyo from Bournemouth. According to Football Insider, the 24-year-old has attracted interest from Tottenham and Newcastle as well. Liverpool are prepared to rival both clubs for his signature. Liverpool are hoping to add more depth to their attacking unit and the versatile Bournemouth forward would be ideal for them. arts.ttl: Man City starlet scores from kick-off in stunning hat-trick including inventive finish in huge win
arts.sum: Manchester City continued their good form in the Under-18 Premier League with a resounding win over Newcastle - featuring a brilliant hat-trick from Divine Mukasa.

arts.ttl: 'He's gone' – Liverpool told Mohamed Salah has made mind up after contract outburst
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has stirred the pot by publicly revealing that Liverpool are yet to offer him a new contract and the Egyptian will be free to speak to foreign clubs in January

arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard addresses Al-Ettifaq sacking as Liverpool icon makes statement after defeat
arts.sum: Steven Gerrard spoke after watching his Al-Ettifaq side lose 4-0 to Al-Ittihad on Saturday in yet another damaging defeat for the Liverpool legend in the Saudi Pro League

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton makes staggering Liverpool vs Man City prediction as pundits say same thing
